'''At'raoth''' was a [[Shamed Ones|Shamed One]] trained by [[Nom Anor]] in his guise as [[Nom Anor|Yu'shaa]].

==Biography==
She was one of Nom Anor's select agents to attempt to infiltrate [[Supreme Overlord]] [[Shimrra Jamaane|Shimrra's]] inner sanctum. She succeeded in reaching the antechamber with a [[villip]] disguised as a [[k'snell vase]], but made it no further. Upon her failure, she triggered the [[irksh poison]] hidden in a false tooth at the back of her mouth. Against Nom Anor's plan and in defiance of Shimrra, Ai'traoth screamed [[Jeedai]] along with [[Ganner Rhysode]]'s name as the poison quickly killed her. This served to show Shimrra just how quickly the Message of the Shamed Ones was growing.

{{Char-stub}}
